Package es.gob.fnmt.gui

Contains the classes related to the user interface.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    SignatureNotification
    Interface to notify about events during the signature process.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    CertificateUI
    Internal dialog to manage de selection of the certificate.
    PasswordUI
    Internal dialog to manage de password of the keystore.
    ProgressDialogUI
    Custom progress dialog to manage internal progress dialog on default fragments (es.gob.fnmt.gui.fragment.NFCCommReaderFragment and es.gob.fnmt.gui.fragment.NetworkCommunicationFragment).
    ProgressDialogUI.Builder
    Java builder pattern class used to build ProgressDialogUI instance.
  • Enum Summary 
    Enum Description
    SignatureNotification.sign_callback_notify
    Event type SignatureNotification.sign_callback_notify.SIGNATURE_INIT SignatureNotification.sign_callback_notify.SIGNATURE_UPDATE SignatureNotification.sign_callback_notify.SIGNATURE_START SignatureNotification.sign_callback_notify.SIGNATURE_DONE
